zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger De Berkley III於1094年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾度斯利時，他的父親Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley26歲，母親Almodis20歲。他和Eve de Valletort至少有1個女兒。他去世於1170年在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger De Berkley III于1094年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾度斯利时，他的父亲Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley26岁，母亲Almodis20岁。他和Eve de Valletort至少有1个女儿。他去世于1170年在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger De Berkley III was born in 1094, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, was 26 and his mother, Almodis, was 20. He had at least 1 daughter with Eve de Valletort. He died in 1170, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger De Berkley III est né en 1094, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Almodis, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Eve de Valletort. Il est décédé en 1170, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger De Berkley III 1094 in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley 26 und seine Mutter Almodis 20. Er hatte mit Eve de Valletort mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1170 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger De Berkley III è nato il nel 1094 nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Almodis, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Eve de Valletort. Morì nel 1170, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.Dursley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリー
ja.Berkeley Castle, Berkeley, Gloucester, E: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリー

ja.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger De Berkley IIIが1094年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで生まれた時，父Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartleyは26歳，母Almodisは20歳であった。彼はEve de Valletortとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1170年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger De Berkley III(이)가 1094년 영국 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Almodis(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Eve de Valletort(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger De Berkley III nasceu em 1094, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Almodis, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Eve de Valletort. Ele faleceu em 1170, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger De Berkley III родился в 1094 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Almodis, 20. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Eve de Valletort. Он умер в 1170 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger De Berkley III nació en 1094, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Almodis, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Eve de Valletort. Murió en 1170, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
